chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No.118 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case 16.02.2026 None present On the last date following order was passed: “Prima facie this is a time barred reference application. Mr. Atif Hafeez advocate holding brief for Mr. Shahzad Mehmood, advocate for the applicant and requests for adjournment. At his request to come up on 16.02.2026.” Today counsel for the Applicant remained unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the Applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad PS
